completion_checks.name: pilot_execution
confirmed_facts: session-27 executed a real pilot change by adding a new report-schema validation test file
the implementation itself passed sandbox validation
the main integration process exposed a missing prerequisite artifact on main
completion_checks.interpretation: Phase6 successfully exercised a real pilot path and surfaced an operational failure mode rather than a purely synthetic check.

completion_checks.name: failure_handling
confirmed_facts: session-27 was reclassified as fail with scope_violation because docs changes were mixed into main integration
session-27a was handled as a no-op ratification because the required artifact was already tracked on main
session-28 recorded failure patterns, root causes, and preventive actions
completion_checks.interpretation: Phase6 demonstrated that the operating model can detect, classify, and preserve failure information without hiding the mistake.

completion_checks.name: progress_visibility
confirmed_facts: session-29 produced a progress dashboard summarizing statuses, failure types, open issues, and next actions
the current Phase6 position is reviewable from docs/reports artifacts alone
completion_checks.interpretation: The operating state is visible enough for human review and final decision-making.

completion_checks.name: operational_reproducibility
confirmed_facts: Phase6 used docs-only sessions where appropriate
the pilot session, failure summary, and dashboard were each separated by purpose
scope violations were not normalized as acceptable outcomes
completion_checks.interpretation: The workflow is reproducible at the operating-model level, even though some merge-gate checks should be tightened.

evidence_summary.pilot_outcome: session-27 provided a real pilot execution and exposed a pre-merge prerequisite gap on main
evidence_summary.failure_outcome: session-28 fixed the organizational learning by classifying the failure and recording preventive actions
evidence_summary.visibility_outcome: session-29 made the Phase6 state reviewable through a single dashboard artifact
evidence_summary.overall_assessment: Phase6 achieved its intended purpose of safe pilot execution, failure capture, and progress visibility

risks: pre-merge prerequisite artifact checks were not enforced before session-27 main integration
manual docs-only aggregation can introduce human counting or wording errors
docs/spec_media_os_profile_capability.md remains untracked and unrelated to Phase6
open_issues: the exact historical reason why docs/reports/phase5_completion_report.json was absent on main before session-27 integration is not fully reconstructed
whether target-branch prerequisite checks should be codified in global_rules.md or AI_DEVELOPMENT_SOP remains undecided

final_judgement.reason: Phase6 successfully completed real pilot execution, failure classification, and progress visibility, and the remaining issues are operational improvements rather than blockers to completion.
